idea-plugin.name: Endpoint Collection Export
idea-plugin.description:
English

Export Spring Boot controllers as API collection files and generate Bruno-compatible OpenCollection YAML.

  • Export an entire controller or a single endpoint from the context menu.
  • Generate opencollection.yml, folder.yml, and workspace entries automatically.
  • Reuse existing project, controller, and endpoint files instead of overwriting them.
  • Include Spring endpoints declared in inherited base controllers.

中文

将 Spring Boot Controller 导出为 API collection 文件，并生成与 Bruno 兼容的 OpenCollection YAML。

  • 支持从右键菜单导出整个 Controller，或仅导出当前方法对应的单个接口。
  • 自动生成 opencollection.yml、folder.yml 和 workspace 条目。
  • 复用已存在的项目、controller 和接口文件，不覆盖已有内容。
  • 包含继承基类中已声明的 Spring 接口。

Source code / 源码：GitHub
